scenario.name: Three review failures exhaust the retry budget; workflow fails

final_local.goal: Document something the writer keeps getting wrong (test fixture exhausts the review gate on purpose).
final_local.intent: type: reference; scope: one page; audience: test fixture.
final_local.review_notes: Structure (1) — failed. Headings don't match the adjacent pages' depth.

flowchart TD

    0_0_1_Human_Approval_Gate["Human Approval Gate\n[action]"]

    Technical_Writer_Workflow --> 0_Assess_Intent
    style 0_Assess_Intent fill:#4ade80,stroke:#16a34a,color:#052e16
